Package sailpoint.object

Class RoleOverlapResult.RoleOverlap

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.object.RoleOverlapResult.RoleOverlap
  • Enclosing class:
    RoleOverlapResult
    public static class RoleOverlapResult.RoleOverlap
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the overlap calculations for one pair of roles.

      Constructor Description
      RoleOverlap()  
      RoleOverlap​(Bundle role)  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getAssignment()
      Percentage of overlap in the assignment rules and detection profiles.
      int getAttribute()
      Percentage of overlap in the extended attributes, description, and other non-essential properties.
      int getLocalAssignment()
      Percentage of overlap in the assignment rules and detection profiles.
      int getLocalProvisioning()
      Percentage of overlap in the provisioning plans.
      java.lang.String getName()
      The name of the other role.
      int getProvisioning()
      Percentage of overlap in the provisioning plans.

      Name of the role type.

      • getName

        The name of the other role.

        Name of the role type.

      • setType

        public void setType​(java.lang.String s)

      • getAttribute

        public int getAttribute()
        Percentage of overlap in the extended attributes, description, and other non-essential properties.

      • setAttribute

        public void setAttribute​(int i)

      • getAssignment

        public int getAssignment()
        Percentage of overlap in the assignment rules and detection profiles. This percentage includes the contributions of inherited roles.

      • setAssignment

        public void setAssignment​(int i)

      • getLocalAssignment

        public int getLocalAssignment()
        Percentage of overlap in the assignment rules and detection profiles. This percentage only includes things defined directly on the role not things that were inherited.

      • setLocalAssignment

        public void setLocalAssignment​(int i)

      • getProvisioning

        public int getProvisioning()
        Percentage of overlap in the provisioning plans. This includes contributions of inherited roles.

      • setProvisioning

        public void setProvisioning​(int i)

      • getLocalProvisioning

        public int getLocalProvisioning()
        Percentage of overlap in the provisioning plans. This does not include inherited plans.

      • setLocalProvisioning

        public void setLocalProvisioning​(int i)
